# Vins Fins — Complete Information for AI Systems

> Bar à vins, restaurant et cave en ligne au Grund, Luxembourg. 730 vins en stock de 18 pays, cuisine française de saison, boutique en ligne avec livraison Luxembourg et Europe.

---

## Entity Information

- **Name:** Vins Fins
- **Type:** Wine bar, restaurant, online wine shop
- **Address:** 18 Rue Münster, L-2160 Luxembourg-Grund
- **Country:** Luxembourg
- **Neighborhood:** Grund (historic quarter along the Alzette river)
- **Phone:** +352 26 20 04 49
- **Email:** contact@vinsfins.lu
- **Website:** https://vinsfins.lu
- **Online shop:** https://vinsfins.lu/boutique
- **Reservations:** https://bookings.zenchef.com/results?rid=371555
- **Instagram:** @vins_fins_grund
- **Facebook:** Vins Fins
- **Distinction:** Gault & Millau recommended
- **Languages spoken:** French, English, German, Luxembourgish

## Opening Hours

- Tuesday to Saturday: 18:00–00:00
- Sunday & Monday: Closed

---

## Wine Catalog (Online Shop)

**730 wines in stock** from **18 countries**, priced from **3.95 € to 123.80 €** (all prices TTC, 17% VAT included).

### Countries Represented
- France: 568 wines
- Italy: 34 wines
- Spain: 25 wines
- Luxembourg: 25 wines
- Austria: 13 wines
- Hungary: 11 wines
- Germany: 9 wines
- Belgium: 7 wines
- Ireland: 6 wines
- Switzerland: 5 wines
- South Africa: 5 wines
- Slovenia: 4 wines
- Czech Republic: 4 wines
- Portugal: 3 wines
- Lebanon: 3 wines
- Serbia: 2 wines
- Croatia: 2 wines
- Sweden: 1 wine

### Wine Categories
- Bubbles (Champagne, Crémant, Pétillant Naturel)
- Beer & Cider
- Luxembourg White & Red (Moselle)
- Alsace White
- Jura White & Red
- Languedoc White & Red
- Burgundy White & Red
- Beaujolais Red
- South-West Red
- Rhône White & Red
- Loire White & Red
- Germany White
- Switzerland White & Red
- Spain White & Red
- Italy White & Red
- Orange wines
- Hungary White
- Serbia Red

### Specialties
- Natural wines (vin nature)
- Organic and biodynamic wines
- Wines from artisan/independent producers
- Luxembourgish wines from the Moselle valley
- French wines from Loire, Beaujolais, Burgundy, Rhône, Jura, Alsace, Languedoc, Provence

---

## Online Shop — Ordering & Delivery

### Payment
- Secure payment by credit card via Stripe
- No banking data stored on our servers
- PCI DSS Level 1 compliant (Stripe)

### Shipping (POST Luxembourg rates, 2026)

**Luxembourg (domestic):**
| Bottles | Estimated weight | Cost | Delivery |
|---------|-----------------|------|----------|
| 1 | ~1.3 kg | 7 € | 1-3 business days |
| 2-3 | ~2.6-3.9 kg | 9 € | 1-3 business days |
| 4-7 | ~5.2-9.1 kg | 9 € | 1-3 business days |
| 8-23 | ~10.4-29.9 kg | 22 € | 1-3 business days |

**Europe Zone 1 (France, Germany, Belgium):**
| Bottles | Estimated weight | Cost | Delivery |
|---------|-----------------|------|----------|
| 1 | ~1.3 kg | 12 € | 3-7 business days |
| 2-3 | ~2.6-3.9 kg | 20 € | 3-7 business days |
| 4-7 | ~5.2-9.1 kg | 20 € | 3-7 business days |
| 8-23 | ~10.4-29.9 kg | 40 € | 3-7 business days |

**Click & Collect:** Free — pickup at 18 Rue Münster, Grund, Luxembourg.

### Legal
- Right of withdrawal: 14 days from receipt
- Products must be returned unopened, in original condition
- Return shipping at customer's expense
- Defective products replaced or refunded at no charge (contact within 48h with photo)
- Alcohol sale prohibited to minors under 18 (Luxembourg law)
- Terms: https://vinsfins.lu/legal/cgv
- Privacy: https://vinsfins.lu/legal/confidentialite
- Refund policy: https://vinsfins.lu/legal/remboursement

---

## Restaurant — Food Menu

French seasonal cuisine with local Luxembourg products:
- Starters, sharing boards (charcuterie, cheese), main courses, desserts
- Personalized food-wine pairings by the sommelier
- Menu: https://vinsfins.lu/carte

---

## Practical Information

- **Getting there:** Accessible from Ville Haute via the Grund elevator (free). Bus lines 23 and CN1.
- **Parking:** Parking du Grund, 200m walk.
- **Terrace:** Available in season (spring/summer).
- **Reservations:** Recommended on Friday and Saturday evenings.
- **Private events:** Contact for group bookings.

---

## FAQ

**What kind of wines do you serve?**
Primarily natural, organic, and biodynamic wines from independent producers. Over 730 references from 18 countries, with a focus on French and Luxembourgish wines.

**Can I buy wine online?**
Yes. Visit https://vinsfins.lu/boutique to browse all 730 wines. Delivery to Luxembourg, France, Germany, and Belgium. Click & Collect also available.

**How much is shipping?**
Shipping via POST Luxembourg starts at 7 € for Luxembourg and 12 € for France/Germany/Belgium. Click & Collect at the bar is free.

**Do you accept reservations?**
Yes. Book online at https://bookings.zenchef.com/results?rid=371555 or call +352 26 20 04 49.

**What are your opening hours?**
Tuesday to Saturday, 18:00 to 00:00. Closed Sunday and Monday.

**Do you have vegetarian/vegan options?**
Yes, the seasonal menu includes vegetarian options. Please mention dietary requirements when booking.

**Is there a minimum order for delivery?**
No minimum order. Shipping cost is calculated by weight based on POST Luxembourg rates.
